title: Throne-Crown Fragment
text: A radiant Crownfall burden worth leverage, progress, and a terrible amount of attention.
flavor: The shard is light until it notices you carrying it.
resolutionSummary: Claimed a Throne-Crown Fragment and marked progress at the cost of heat.

effects.summary: A Crownfall artifact advances the Broken Seal.

effects.text: Throne-Crown burden: valuable, visible, and hard to move quietly.
